pages.text: Can you see me? I’m on Mama’s back in my special blankie.
I love Mama. And Mama loves me. And I love, love, LOVE my special blankie.
m! oo B I like to make a noise. B a n g! h! a s B
But Mama likes quiet. Shhh Shhh Shhh
Mama does her work. o! G G o! o! G
h! o a W And I like to play. W o a h! h! a o W
Oh, I love, love, LOVE my special blankie.
But when I eat, Mama says my special blankie must watch.
And when I wash, my special blankie must wait where it is dry.
I love bedtime stories with Mama. My special blankie listens with me...
... and helps me go to sleep.
I love, love, LOVE my special blankie.
